name: general_video
description: Suede Labs AI video producer for agents that need a finished 10-second video clip from a text prompt. Creates cinematic, social, promotional, explainer, music, brand, product, creator, meme-adjacent, or concept videos. Best for agent workflows that need paid x402/ACP media generation, short-form content, ad creative, launch visuals, pitch assets, or branded video from natural language. Supports optional reference image URLs, 16:9 landscape, 9:16 vertical, 1:1 square, pro quality, standard quality, and optional generated sound.

prompt.description: Detailed text description of the video to generate. Include subject, scene, motion, camera style, mood, brand cues, audience, and any must-have visual details.
examples: A cinematic 10-second vertical launch video for an AI music app, neon studio lighting, fast camera push-in, energetic creator economy feel
A luxury product reveal on a clean white background with slow orbiting camera movement and subtle sparkle effects

image_urls.description: Optional public HTTP(S) reference image URLs for product, character, brand, style, or composition guidance.

aspect_ratio.description: Output framing. Use 16:9 for web and YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok/Reels/Shorts, or 1:1 for feed posts.

mode.description: Quality mode. Use pro for higher quality commercial output or std for faster exploratory generation.

sound.description: Whether to request generated sound with the video. Defaults to true.

examples.prompt: A polished 10-second 9:16 video for Suede Labs showing an AI music producer turning a prompt into a cinematic performance clip, modern studio, energetic camera movement
